prompt: I'm working on a booking form for a hotel reservation system. The form has: check-in date, check-out date, number of guests, room type (standard/deluxe/suite), and special requests (text). Angi is already installed. What actions should I define so users can say things like 'book a deluxe room for 2 guests from March 15 to March 18' or 'add a note that we need a crib'? Show me the full useAngiComponent setup.

assertions.text: Calls useAngiComponent with a description relevant to hotel booking
Defines a separate action for setting check-in date
Defines a separate action for setting check-out date
Defines an action for number of guests with 'number' schema type
Defines an action for selecting room type that mentions the valid options (standard/deluxe/suite)
Defines an action for adding/setting special requests
getState includes all booking fields (dates, guests, room type, special requests)
Actions are kept granular (separate actions per field, not one combined action)
